title: Ansible Vault
learningObjectives: Encrypt and decrypt variables and files with ansible-vault
Use vault-encrypted variables inline in playbooks
Manage multiple vault IDs for different environments
Integrate vault with CI/CD pipelines securely

theory.content:
What is Ansible Vault?

Ansible Vault encrypts sensitive data — passwords, API keys, certificates — so you can safely store them in version control. Vault uses AES-256 symmetric encryption.

Encrypting Files

# Encrypt an entire file
ansible-vault encrypt group_vars/all/secrets.yml

# Create a new encrypted file
ansible-vault create group_vars/production/vault.yml

# View encrypted file without decrypting on disk
ansible-vault view secrets.yml

# Edit encrypted file in-place
ansible-vault edit secrets.yml

# Decrypt a file
ansible-vault decrypt secrets.yml

# Re-key (change password)
ansible-vault rekey secrets.yml

Encrypting Single Variables

# Encrypt a single string value
ansible-vault encrypt_string 'MyS3cretP@ss' --name 'db_password'

# Output can be pasted directly into a vars file:
db_password: !vault |
  $ANSIBLE_VAULT;1.1;AES256
  66386439653236336462626566653...
  ...

Running Playbooks with Vault

# Prompt for password
ansible-playbook site.yml --ask-vault-pass

# Use password file
ansible-playbook site.yml --vault-password-file ~/.vault_pass

# Use environment variable
export ANSIBLE_VAULT_PASSWORD_FILE=~/.vault_pass
ansible-playbook site.yml

Multiple Vault IDs

# Encrypt with a specific vault ID label
ansible-vault encrypt_string 'prod_secret' \
  --vault-id prod@~/.vault_prod \
  --name 'api_key'

# Run playbook providing multiple vault passwords
ansible-playbook site.yml \
  --vault-id dev@~/.vault_dev \
  --vault-id prod@~/.vault_prod

Best Practices

  • Store vault passwords in a secrets manager (AWS Secrets Manager, HashiCorp Vault)
  • Use vault IDs to separate dev/staging/prod secrets
  • Never commit unencrypted secrets — use pre-commit hooks
  • Separate vaulted variables from plain variables (keep group_vars/all/vars.yml and group_vars/all/vault.yml)

Vault Guide →
